tools.description: Search Google Ad Manager MCP tools by keyword, group, and read-only status for OpenAI tool_search or deferred-loading clients.
tools.name: find_tools

tools.description: Read-only dependency proof for exact Ad Manager ad units across placements and SOAP line-item inventory targeting.

ad_unit_codes.description: Exact ad-unit codes to resolve through the REST adUnits collection.

ad_unit_ids.description: Exact numeric ad-unit ids to include even when a code row is unavailable.

api_version.description: SOAP API version for LineItemService reads. Defaults to the current server default.

include_line_item_xml.description: Include bounded raw line-item XML snippets for matched line items. Defaults to false.

line_item_page_size.description: Number of LineItemService rows to fetch per SOAP page. Defaults to 500, max 1000.

max_line_items.description: Maximum LineItemService rows to inspect before reporting a capped proof. Defaults to 1000, max 5000.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

placement_page_size.description: Number of placement rows to inspect from REST. Defaults to 500, max 1000.

tools.name: gam_ad_unit_dependency_probe

tools.description: Read-only exact-identity, hierarchy, and freshness-bound external-evidence assessment for one to ten canonical Ad Manager ad-unit ids; the final recommendation remains not_run.

manual_ui_proof_included.description: Required for exchange/protection complete-clear proof while GAM UI-only surfaces remain unsupported by API.

network_code.description: Network code covered by this evidence receipt.

note.description: Optional bounded, non-sensitive operator note. The note is never echoed.

observed_at_unix_seconds.description: Unix epoch seconds when the source proof completed.

operator_action.description: Fixed non-authorisation guidance emitted by built-in evidence producers.

provenance.description: Fixed provenance marker emitted by built-in evidence producers.

result_hash.description: Opaque result hash from the source proof. Raw payloads are not accepted.

source.description: Expected evidence source for this proof surface.

source_version.description: Source tool, schema, or contract version that produced the result hash.

state.description: Evidence conclusion before freshness, target binding, and provenance grading.

target_ad_unit_ids.description: Exact canonical ad-unit ids covered by the source proof.

ttl_seconds.description: Maximum age accepted for this proof. Maximum 31 days.

window_end_unix_seconds.description: Optional evidence-window end. Required for delivery-report and telemetry receipts.

window_start_unix_seconds.description: Optional evidence-window start. Required for delivery-report and telemetry receipts.

ad_unit_ids.description: One to ten exact canonical positive numeric ad-unit ids to assess.

ad_unit_page_size.description: Number of ordered ad-unit catalog rows to request per hierarchy page. Defaults to 1000.

evidence.description: Freshness-bound external proof receipts. Raw reports and telemetry are not accepted.

max_ad_units.description: Maximum catalog rows to reconcile before hierarchy proof fails closed. Defaults to 5000.

network_code.description: Canonical positive numeric Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

tools.name: gam_ad_unit_retirement_assessment

tools.description: Build a copyable gcloud Application Default Credentials login command for Google Ad Manager without running it.

client_id_file.description: Optional downloaded OAuth client JSON path for gcloud ADC login.

manage_scope.description: Request the write-capable Ad Manager manage scope instead of the current server scope.

no_launch_browser.description: Include --no-launch-browser for headless flows. Defaults to true.

quota_project.description: Optional quota project to set after login.

shared_adc.description: Use the conventional shared gcloud ADC file instead of a server-specific file.

tools.name: gam_auth_login_command

tools.description: Inspect configured Google Ad Manager credential inputs and optionally verify live upstream access without returning secrets.

verify_access.description: When true, make a live low-cost Ad Manager API call to prove access.

tools.name: gam_auth_status

tools.description: Read-only proof for whether exact Ad Manager ad units appear exposed to AdSense, private auctions, private deals, or yield groups, while naming unsupported protection surfaces explicitly.

ad_unit_codes.description: Exact ad-unit codes to prove, for example Home_Page_LS or Search_Page_RS.

api_version.description: SOAP API version for YieldGroupService reads. Defaults to the current server default.

include_raw.description: Include bounded raw SOAP response XML in the yield-group summary. Defaults to false.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

page_size.description: Maximum rows to inspect from private auction, private deal, and yield group reads. Defaults to 100.

tools.name: gam_exchange_protection_probe

tools.description: Explain the recommended first-run flow, credential options, and starter tools for Google Ad Manager.
tools.name: gam_get_started

tools.description: List a curated Google Ad Manager network collection such as ad units, orders, line items, placements, private auctions, private auction deals, or reports.

filter.description: Optional Ad Manager Beta filter expression.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

order_by.description: Optional Ad Manager Beta orderBy expression.

tools.name: gam_network_catalog_list

tools.description: List Google Ad Manager networks visible to the authenticated principal.
tools.name: gam_networks_list

tools.description: Fetch rows from a completed Google Ad Manager report result resource.

result_name.description: Result resource name, for example networks/123/reports/456/results/789.

tools.name: gam_report_result_rows

tools.description: Run a saved Google Ad Manager report, optionally wait for completion, and optionally fetch the first page of result rows.

fetch_first_page.description: If waiting, also fetch the first page of result rows. Defaults to true.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

report_id.description: Numeric report identifier from the Ad Manager UI or reports.list.

wait_for_completion.description: Wait for the report operation to complete. Defaults to true.

tools.name: gam_report_run

tools.description: Apply an allowlisted Google Ad Manager REST write plan after explicit runtime, scope, and confirmation-token gates.

body.description: Official Ad Manager REST request JSON body.

expected_impact.description: Expected advertiser, campaign, delivery, or operational impact.

idempotency_key.description: Optional caller-supplied idempotency or ticket reference.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the proposed change.

resource.description: Allowlisted REST beta resource to mutate.

resource_name.description: Full resource name for patch operations, for example networks/123/adUnits/456.

rollback_note.description: Rollback or reversal note. Required by policy for live apply review.

update_mask.description: Optional field mask for patch operations, for example displayName,status.

confirmation_token.description: Confirmation token returned by gam_rest_write_plan for this exact request.

tools.name: gam_rest_write_apply

tools.description: Create a dry-run plan and confirmation token for an allowlisted Google Ad Manager REST write operation without mutating upstream state.

body.description: Official Ad Manager REST request JSON body.

expected_impact.description: Expected advertiser, campaign, delivery, or operational impact.

idempotency_key.description: Optional caller-supplied idempotency or ticket reference.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the proposed change.

resource.description: Allowlisted REST beta resource to mutate.

resource_name.description: Full resource name for patch operations, for example networks/123/adUnits/456.

rollback_note.description: Rollback or reversal note. Required by policy for live apply review.

update_mask.description: Optional field mask for patch operations, for example displayName,status.

tools.name: gam_rest_write_plan

tools.description: Close a Google Ad Manager scratchpad session and remove its local DuckDB database.

session_id.description: Scratchpad session identifier. Use stable names such as gam_delivery_2026_07.

tools.name: gam_scratchpad_close_session

tools.description: Drop one table from a Google Ad Manager scratchpad session.

if_exists.description: Treat a missing table as a success. Defaults to true.

tools.name: gam_scratchpad_drop_table

tools.description: Export a bounded markdown evidence bundle from Google Ad Manager scratchpad tables.

sample_rows_per_table.description: Rows sampled from each table in the markdown bundle.

tables.description: Optional table allowlist. Defaults to every table in the session.

tools.name: gam_scratchpad_export_evidence_bundle

tools.description: Fetch one Google Ad Manager network catalog page and ingest it into a scratchpad table.

append.description: Append rows to an existing scratchpad table instead of replacing it.

collection.description: Which curated network collection to fetch and ingest.

filter.description: Optional Ad Manager Beta filter expression.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

order_by.description: Optional Ad Manager Beta orderBy expression.

table_name.description: Scratchpad table name to create or append to.

tools.name: gam_scratchpad_ingest_network_catalog

tools.description: Fetch one completed Google Ad Manager report-result page and ingest it into a scratchpad table.

append.description: Append rows to an existing scratchpad table instead of replacing it.

result_name.description: Result resource name, for example networks/123/reports/456/results/789.

table_name.description: Scratchpad table name to create or append to.

tools.name: gam_scratchpad_ingest_report_result_rows

tools.description: Run a bounded read-only LineItemService SOAP query and ingest parsed line-item delivery rows into a Google Ad Manager scratchpad table.

api_version.description: SOAP API version, for example v202605. Defaults to the current server default.

append.description: Append rows to an existing scratchpad table instead of replacing it.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

query.description:
Bounded PQL statement for LineItemService.getLineItemsByStatement.
Must start with WHERE, ORDER BY, or LIMIT. Queries without LIMIT are capped automatically.

table_name.description: Scratchpad table name to create or append to.

tools.name: gam_scratchpad_ingest_soap_line_items

tools.description: List active Google Ad Manager scratchpad sessions.
tools.name: gam_scratchpad_list_sessions

tools.description: List tables in a Google Ad Manager scratchpad session.
tools.name: gam_scratchpad_list_tables

tools.description: Open or refresh a bounded local DuckDB scratchpad session for Google Ad Manager evidence work.

session_id.description: Scratchpad session identifier. Use stable names such as gam_delivery_2026_07.

tools.name: gam_scratchpad_open_session

tools.description: Run bounded read-only DuckDB SQL against a Google Ad Manager scratchpad session.

sql.description: Read-only SQL query. Only SELECT/WITH/EXPLAIN/DESCRIBE/SUMMARIZE style queries are allowed.

tools.name: gam_scratchpad_query

tools.description: Build a safe inner payload_xml fragment for common Google Ad Manager SOAP trafficking templates without calling upstream.

template.description: Safe helper template to render into an inner SOAP payload_xml fragment.

values.description: Template values such as order_id, line_item_id, creative_id, advertiser_id, name_contains, or line_item_ids.

tools.name: gam_soap_payload_build

tools.description: Run an allowlisted Google Ad Manager SOAP trafficking or forecast operation after scope, runtime, and confirmation-token gates.

api_version.description: SOAP API version, for example v202605. Defaults to the current server default.

expected_impact.description: Expected advertiser, campaign, delivery, or operational impact. Required for mutating apply.

idempotency_key.description: Optional caller-supplied idempotency or ticket reference.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

operation.description: Allowlisted Google Ad Manager SOAP trafficking or forecast operation.

payload_xml.description: Inner XML payload for the selected operation, excluding SOAP Envelope, Header, and operation wrapper. Empty string is accepted only for no-body reads such as get_yield_partners.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the proposed live SOAP call.

rollback_note.description: Rollback or reversal note. Required by policy for mutating apply review.

confirmation_token.description: Confirmation token returned by gam_soap_trafficking_plan for this exact request.

idempotency_key.description: Optional caller-supplied idempotency or ticket reference.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

operation.description: Allowlisted Google Ad Manager SOAP trafficking or forecast operation.

payload_xml.description: Inner XML payload for the selected operation, excluding SOAP Envelope, Header, and operation wrapper. Empty string is accepted only for no-body reads such as get_yield_partners.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the proposed live SOAP call.

rollback_note.description: Rollback or reversal note. Required by policy for mutating apply review.

tools.description: Describe the current Google Ad Manager write and trafficking surface, including REST-supported writes, SOAP trafficking operations, and remaining ergonomics gaps.

include_gaps.description: Include remaining high-level builder, response-modeling, and readback gaps. Defaults to true.

tools.description: Apply a previewed YieldGroupService descendant-safe ad-unit exclusion update after write-mode, manage-scope, confirmation-token, and readback gates.

api_version.description: SOAP API version, for example v202605. Defaults to the current server default.

excluded_ad_unit_ids.description: Ad-unit IDs to ensure in YieldGroupService InventoryTargeting.excludedAdUnits. Requested entries are written descendant-safe with includeDescendants=true.

expected_impact.description: Expected advertiser, campaign, delivery, or operational impact. Required for apply.

idempotency_key.description: Optional caller-supplied idempotency or ticket reference.

include_payload_xml.description: Include generated SOAP payload fragments in the response. Defaults to false.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the proposed yield-group exclusion change.

rollback_note.description: Rollback or reversal note. Required by policy for live apply review.

confirmation_token.description: Confirmation token returned by gam_yield_group_exclusions_preview for this exact request and readback fingerprint.

tools.name: gam_yield_group_exclusions_apply

tools.description: Read one YieldGroupService yield group and preview descendant-safe ad-unit IDs in InventoryTargeting.excludedAdUnits without mutating Google Ad Manager.

api_version.description: SOAP API version, for example v202605. Defaults to the current server default.

excluded_ad_unit_ids.description: Ad-unit IDs to ensure in YieldGroupService InventoryTargeting.excludedAdUnits. Requested entries are written descendant-safe with includeDescendants=true.

expected_impact.description: Expected advertiser, campaign, delivery, or operational impact. Required for apply.

idempotency_key.description: Optional caller-supplied idempotency or ticket reference.

include_payload_xml.description: Include generated SOAP payload fragments in the response. Defaults to false.

network_code.description: Raw Ad Manager network code, for example 1234567.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the proposed yield-group exclusion change.

rollback_note.description: Rollback or reversal note. Required by policy for live apply review.
